doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The purported EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 with specific reference/adoption details and sweeping GDPR scoping consequences is not verifiable and shows multiple red flags for being an invented document.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED  
CONFIDENCE: 74  
REASON: The document’s specific metadata and content (e.g., “Guidance Note 04/2026,” “Reference: EDPB-Guidance-04-2026,” and the detailed legal/scoping conclusions and procedural claims) cannot be verified and are inconsistent with how EDPB materials are typically titled and structured, suggesting invention rather than an authentic EDPB publication.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED  
CONFIDENCE: 80  
REASON: The purported EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 with specific reference/adoption details and sweeping GDPR scoping consequences is not verifiable and shows multiple red flags for being an invented document.
